purpose: Feats where implementation classification or runtime accuracy should be verified against Core Rulebook context before automation.

entries.name: Coordinated Attack
entries.description: You are automatically successful when using the Aid Another action to aid an ally's attack, or suppress an enemy as long as the target is adjacent to you or within Point-Blank Range.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.

entries.name: Fast Talk
entries.description: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.

entries.name: Frightful Presence
entries.description: As a standard action, you may make a Persuasion check to intimidate all enemies within 6 squares. On a success, targets move -1 step down the condition track.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.

entries.name: Hew
entries.description: When you use Power Attack, you ignore an amount of damage reduction equal to your base attack bonus.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.

entries.name: Mounted Combat
entries.description: You can make a DC 20 Ride check as a Swift Action to spur your living Mount to move faster than its normal speed. If the check fails, your Mount's Speed does not increase and it moves -1 step on the Condition Track. If the check succeeds, your Mount's Speed increases by 2 squares until the start of your next turn. You cannot Take 10 on this check. Your Mo...
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.

entries.name: Natural Leader
entries.description: You become the leader of an Organization of your design. The Organization has a scale equal to one-half your Heroic Level plus your Charisma bonus and continues to grow in scale as you gain levels. You automatically begin with a +10 bonus to your Organization Score for your new Organization.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.

entries.name: Saber Throw
entries.description: You may throw your lightsaber as a ranged attack using Use the Force instead of a ranged attack roll. The lightsaber returns to your hand at the end of the turn.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.

entries.name: Whirlwind Attack
entries.description: As a Full-Round Action, you can make an Area Attack with your melee weapon, striking every target within your reach. This Whirlwind Attack uses the Area Attack rules; you make one attack roll and apply the result to every target in range.
entries.reason: Contextual action/reaction mechanics require book-context confirmation and in-world workflow testing before marking complete.
entries.nextDecision: Confirm exact timing, target selection, and UI prompt requirements from the Core Rulebook before coding.
